title: AI Mugshot
description: Uses the default AI provider to stage a photo as a realistic police booking portrait.
positive_prompt: Realistic police mugshot portrait, standing against a height measurement wall, holding an arrest placard with booking number, dramatic law enforcement photography, neutral facial expression, front-facing pose, authentic police station environment, cinematic lighting, highly detailed facial features, realistic skin texture, professional booking photo, true crime documentary style, ultra realistic, sharp focus, high detail, photorealistic, serious atmosphere
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, CGI, 3D render, blurry, low resolution, distorted face, deformed body, extra fingers, extra limbs, duplicate features, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text overlays, smiling excessively, glamour photography, fashion shoot, futuristic background, fantasy elements, pixelated, noise, artifacts, cropped head, overexposed, underexposed
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. vintage booking photo, documentary lighting...
